title: Review Gemini OAuth subscription — antigravity key bans
description: Gemini provider uses antigravity/internal OAuth key that is getting users banned. Gemini CLI uses its own OAuth flow (user authenticates with their own Google account). Need to: 1) investigate how Gemini CLI does OAuth (likely ~/.config/gcloud or similar), 2) decide if we should implement the same flow, 3) check if current antigravity key is actually our key or user-provided. Risky: using an internal key for production users is a TOS violation.
